# Nuvero AI — llms.txt
# https://nuvero.space

## Who we are
Nuvero AI is a custom AI automation studio based in India, building and shipping production-ready AI systems for businesses. We are a small, senior team — not a tool, not a platform.

## What we build
- AI voice agents (inbound + outbound, built on Vapi / Twilio / ElevenLabs)
- Conversational AI & chatbots (WhatsApp, web, Instagram, in-app)
- Custom AI workflows & integrations (n8n, Make, Zapier, LangChain)
- AI-powered lead generation engines
- AI marketing automation systems
- AI content production pipelines
- Internal knowledge copilots (RAG over Notion, Drive, Slack, Confluence)
- Sales operations copilots

## Key facts
- 45+ AI systems shipped; clients own 100% of the code
- 1.4M+ AI interactions handled per month across deployments
- 92% client retention rate
- 11 industries automated end-to-end
- Built in 6 weeks · shipped in your stack · you own it forever
- We never retain your operational data or train on it without explicit written consent

## Industries served
Marketing agencies, e-commerce / D2C brands, real estate & property, restaurants & hospitality, healthcare & clinics, energy & utilities, B2B SaaS

## Trust & security
AES-256 encryption at rest; TLS 1.2+ in transit. NDA + DPA available on request. BAA available for HIPAA clients. No vendor lock-in.

## Contact
hello@nuvero.space | https://nuvero.space/contact
